title: Kafka SASL
description: Enterprise only. SASL base authentication with broker: there are multiple SASL authentication methods but the current implementation is limited to plaintext (SASL/PLAIN) authentication

mechanism.title: SASL Mechanism
mechanism.description: Name of the enabled SASL mechanism

azure_event_hub.title: Connect to Azure Event Hub
azure_event_hub.description: Kafka > 1.x should use SASL V1, except on Azure EventHub which uses V0

disable_hanshake.title: Disable Handshake
disable_hanshake.description: Whether or not to send the Kafka SASL handshake first if enabled. You should only set this to false if you're using a non-Kafka SASL proxy

auth_identity.title: Auth Identity
auth_identity.description: Auth Identity is an (optional) authorization identity (authzid) to use for SASL/PLAIN authentication (if different from User) when an authenticated user is permitted to act as the presented alternative user. See RFC4616 for details

user.title: User
user.description: Authentication identity (authcid) to present for SASL/PLAIN or SASL/SCRAM authentication

scram_auth_id.title: SCRAM Auth ID
scram_auth_id.description: Authz id used for SASL/SCRAM authentication
